neighborhoods.name: Faro Centro
neighborhoods.description: Regional capital with an old town inside medieval walls, marina, and international airport
neighborhoods.character: Regional capital, walled old town, university city

housing.predominantType: Apartments in old town and modern buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Faro. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Lagos
neighborhoods.description: Historic port town on the western Algarve with dramatic cliffs, old town, and marina
neighborhoods.character: Historic port, dramatic cliffs, marina lifestyle
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Faro's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Silves
neighborhoods.description: Inland former Moorish capital with hilltop castle, orange groves, and lower costs than the coast
neighborhoods.character: Moorish heritage, inland affordable, orange groves
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Albufeira / Vilamoura
neighborhoods.description: Major resort area and luxury marina with the largest expat community in the Algarve
neighborhoods.character: Resort marina, large expat community, golf and beach

housing.predominantType: Modern condos, villas, and marina apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
